ote:

>>

>> and a committer will take care of it.
>>

>> =A0 =A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/145726
> =

> When I use the new version I can't unlock my locked X display anymore=

> (failed attempt). FreeBSD 8.0-RELEASE, xorg 7.4_3. Don't you have tha=
t
> problem?

I can unlock my locked X display at this version (xlockmore-5.30)
FreeBSD 7.3-stable, xorg-7.4_4.
